questions.question: Explain why reusing a One-Time Pad key compromises security.
expectedPoints: If same key K is used for messages M1 and M2
Ciphertexts are C1 = M1 ⊕ K and C2 = M2 ⊕ K
Attacker can compute C1 ⊕ C2 = M1 ⊕ M2
This reveals information about both plaintexts

questions.question: Compare and contrast cryptography and steganography, discussing their purposes, methods, and relative advantages.
expectedPoints: Cryptography: protects content, uses mathematical algorithms, obvious encryption
Steganography: hides existence, uses embedding techniques, covert presence
Cryptography draws attention to encrypted data
Steganography avoids detection by making data look normal
Combined approach provides both content protection and existence hiding
Each has different applications based on security needs
